what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for an image asset named p-40 in the design-source/recent-pitches channel, including its URI address, blob reference, MIME type, provenance, and creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter with asset metadata fields
image/jpeg MIME type with name p-40
body line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — recent-pitches/p-40.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image record
links array is empty so no outgoing relationships are declared
Address uses an image://design-source/recent-pitches/p-40 URI scheme
concerns: Zero width/height suggests image dimensions were not extracted or are placeholders
No descriptive caption, alt text, or content tags for the image
Empty links array means the asset is not yet connected to pitches, sessions, or other records
notes: A sparse ledger stub for a design-source pitch image that has provenance but no computed dimensions or relationships yet.
questions: What pitch or concept does p-40 represent?
Should there be links to the session, pitch, or related assets?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is a SOURCE design ground-truth image record; the file does that, but the zero dimensions and empty links mean it is an incomplete metadata stub.
intention_signals: To register a specific pitch image in the design-source channel so it can be addressed, retrieved, and traced back to its source material and authoring session.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable ledger entry and provenance anchor for the p-40 image asset, including its blob reference, channel location, and authoring context.
summary_for_embedding: A markdown ledger stub for an image asset in the design-source/recent-pitches channel with YAML metadata, a blob reference, zero dimensions, and no declared links.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design ground-truth pitch image so it can be referenced and retrieved within the channel-memory system.
